name: Team Lung wRATh; Plus Two More (Arknights)
description:
"Hm...the L.G.D must be stooping to new lows if you're dressed like that."

"闭嘴，老鼠!"

"Come on Ch'en, just enjoy yourself here."

"Ah, yes, listen to Madam Oni, the voice of reason in our...'group'."

"Hey, stop ignoring me!"
creator: RPKAppreciator
